validatedBehavior: The 8-node wall-clock run exercised normal flow, order-outage buffering, recovery replay through dedupe, and final drain.
The 11454 order_buffer_only routes and 8470 replay_through_dedupe routes account for all 19924 buffered events.
Replay returned to idle with zero pending rows, zero retry-waiting rows, and no consecutive replay failures.
All recorded anomalies were warnings generated under the stress profile and did not prevent recovery.
notValidated: This run did not exercise the full dual-downstream-outage path.
This run did not inject a replay-delivery failure or validate retry backoff.
This run did not demonstrate the protective stop path that would surface as HTTP 503.
notes: The harness emitted no duplicate-leaks.ndjson artifact for this run.
Paths, the SQLite database location, peer instance identifiers, and host-specific filesystem details were intentionally omitted.
